Id1.text: Located in Wilson Township, Alpena County, Michigan, Alpena County Regional Airport has an elevation of 210 metres above sea level and a runway length of 1,533 metres.

Id3.text: Alpena County Regional Airport is located in the Wilson Township, Alpena County, Michigan. It is 210 m above sea level and its runway length is 1533 feet.
